criteria.description: Preserve the spec-kitty merge CLI surface byte-for-byte (flags, defaults, help, hidden --feature alias, --json gate, dry-run JSON key set, error/exit paths).
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_merge_cli_golden.py (golden characterization harness, 8 tests) stayed byte-identical green across WP01-WP11; pins help/flags, --json gate, dry-run JSON key set, REJECTED_REVIEW_ARTIFACT_CONFLICT.
criteria.notes: Final merge suite 562 passed; golden test is the byte-identity meter.

criteria.description: Top-of-file #2057 decomposition pointer comment (matches #2056/#1623 convention) documenting the seam map and shim role.
criteria.evidence: WP11 installed the pointer comment at the top of src/specify_cli/cli/commands/merge.py listing all 10 seam modules + the one-way-import / no-grow / __all__ rules.

criteria.description: Decompose merge.py into the research-resolved seams (constants, git_probes, resolve, preflight/push_preflight, forecast, ordering, done_bookkeeping, bookkeeping_projection, executor).
criteria.notes: All seams one-way-import (AST-enforced in each seam test).

criteria.description: Each extracted seam carries a focused test file with >=90% coverage of the moved code.
criteria.evidence: tests/merge/test_{constants,git_probes,resolve,preflight,forecast,ordering_bake,done_bookkeeping,bookkeeping_projection}_seam.py + tests/merge/test_executor_phase_boundary.py — all green; each exercises the moved branches directly.
criteria.notes: Per-seam tests authored in the seam's own WP.

criteria.description: Internally decompose the CC-102 driver and other >15-CC functions to <=15 CC each.
criteria.evidence: radon cc -n B over merge.py + all seams shows every function <=15: _run_lane_based_merge_locked decomposed into 13 phase helpers via _MergeRunState; _collect_hollow_review_warnings (CC21), _mark_wp_merged_done (CC22), _assert_merged_wps_done_on_target (CC16) split; ruff C901 (max-complexity 15) clean.
criteria.notes: Ruff C901 == Sonar S3776 ceiling of 15.

criteria.description: Re-export relocated symbols from the shim so the 3 src consumers + ~41 test files import unchanged.
criteria.evidence: orchestrator_api/commands.py, agent/mission.py, doctor.py import-smoke green; every seam test asserts shim re-exports the same object; full merge suite (562) + integration (71) green with the shim's __all__ preserved.
criteria.notes: Test patch-targets repointed to seam homes where collaborators moved (behavior-preserving).

criteria.description: Preserve the #1827 baseline record/assert ordering (INV-5) and the restore-on-error rollback (INV-6) exactly, with a phase-boundary regression test.
criteria.notes: INV-5 + INV-6 preserved across the executor phase boundaries.
